prerequisites: An EasyPost account. Sign up at https://app.easypost.com/signup to obtain API keys.
An EasyPost API key (Test or Production), found in the EasyPost Dashboard under Account Settings > API Keys.
A start date to define the earliest record the sync should pull (the start_date config field).

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic Auth username)
authMethods.summary: EasyPost authenticates each request with an API key used as the HTTP Basic Auth username, with no password required. Provide this API key in the connector's username secret field. EasyPost issues both Test and Production keys; use the Production key for live data.

setupSteps.title: Create an EasyPost account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at https://app.easypost.com/signup. After registration, EasyPost provides both Test and Production API keys.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API key
setupSteps.body: Open the EasyPost Dashboard and go to Account Settings > API Keys (https://app.easypost.com/account/settings?tab=api-keys). Copy a Test or Production API key. Use the Production key to sync live data.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter your EasyPost API key in the username field (it is used as the HTTP Basic Auth username, no password needed). Set start_date to the earliest date from which records should be replicated.
